highlights.title: Nvidia Supplier Hon Hai’s Sales Beat on Continued AI Demand
highlights.description: Nvidia Corp.’s server assembly partner Hon Hai Precision Industry Co. reported a bigger-than-expected 40% jump in quarterly sales and said AI demand is growing further.
